---
applyTo: ["**"]
description: "Rules for GitHub Copilot commit message generation."
---

# Commit Message Instructions

- Use imperative mood.
- Prefer one concise subject line, no longer than 72 characters when practical.
- Name the actual behavior, governance surface, or validation layer changed.
- Include a short body only when multiple areas changed or validation evidence
  is needed.
- Mention validation evidence when it materially changes release confidence.
- Do not invent issue IDs, ticket links, reviewers, runtime results, or tests.
- Do not include secrets, raw logs, private payloads, environment values, or
  personal data.
